description: Raw data containing pixel brightness measurements for the individual glass samples at various tumbling durations and with various abrasive media.
Raw counts of physical imperfections across different glass batches and abrasive media.
Meteorological data including Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI), cloud opacity, and air temperature from SolCast for Cape Maclear, Malawi for the year 2024.
Calculated financial projections comparing the cost per 100kg of tumbled glass based on the assumed lifetime of the glass tumbler.
Processed dataset providing the mean brightness values for each glass sample batch (of time and abrasive media).
Processed dataset providing the average number of imperfections for each glass treatment category and time tumbled.
Start-up feasibility analysis for the tumbler using a single 260W solar panel configuration.
Start-up feasibility analysis for the tumbler using a dual 520W solar panel configuration.
Yearly statistical distribution of daily operational runtimes for both the 260W and 520W power scenarios.
